title: Model Guidance Snapshot
description: Deterministic point-in-time snapshot of model capabilities, constraints, and prompting rules for a given provider/model.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Must be 0.x-draft for A6 phase.

snapshot_id.description: Unique identifier for this snapshot, typically ISO-8601 timestamp format (e.g., 20260504T140000Z_kling_omni).

internal_model_target.description: Internal canonical target identifying the model family and latest best version.

provider_surface.description: How the model is accessed (web UI, API, native app, etc.).

expires_at.description: When this snapshot expires and requires refresh.

human_verified.description: Whether a human has verified this snapshot's accuracy.

current_default_model.description: The model version that is the current default when no version is specified.

latest_available_model.description: The latest available model version from the provider.

best_for_this_task.description: The recommended model version for production prompting, if different from default.

feature_required_model.description: Mapping of feature names to minimum required model versions.

hardcode_in_adapter.description: Model version strings must NEVER be hardcoded in adapter code.

adapter_must_read_snapshot.description: Adapters must read this snapshot at prompt generation time.

prompt_generation_blocks_if_expired.description: Prompt generation is blocked if snapshot expires_at is in the past.

prompt_generation_blocks_if_unverified.description: Prompt generation is blocked if human_verified is false.

sources.description: One or more sources of evidence for this snapshot.

source_type.description: Classification of source (official_docs, verified_platform_blog, research_article, etc.).

retrieved_at.description: When this source was accessed or verified.

capabilities.description: Model capabilities (output_type, supports_X, max_duration, native_resolution, etc.).

prompting_rules.description: Array of prompting rules/guidelines for this model.
